results.title: Cyber Insurance Requirements: What Carriers Want | Breach Craft
results.snippet: February 21, 2026 - Business email compromise accounts for the largest single category of cyber insurance claims. Coalition’s 2024 figures put BEC and funds transfer fraud at 60% of filed claims, and they recovered $31 million for policyholders through their active response work that year. The implication is clear: carriers know email is the primary attack vector, and they’re requiring controls that reflect that. In 2026, “mailbox-level email security” typically means:
